authorization: D-01 + 2026-06-15 RE-AUTHORIZED second live-trainer instrumentation cycle (plan 05-18). OFFLINE RUN-ONCE/COMMIT; CI reads only this JSON, never the trainer (D-08/D-09).
spike001_resolution: The committed live_trainer_ctr_bins_blocker.json paired the averaging online-CTR ui8 bins (stored in CTR materialization order Q) with GetLearnPermutationArray()=[11,18,15,29,..] (the DIFFERENT leaf-index iteration order) and never logged LearnTargetClass — hence internally inconsistent (Spike-001 VERDICT). Atomically re-instrumented (train.cpp self_consistent_ctr + online_ctr.cpp online_ctr_inputs): the bins ARE the single-cat-0 Borders online prefix under order Q with target=LearnTargetClass[1]=binarized-y; Q reproduces all 5 tree partitions [6,0,10,14],[8,8,0,14],[6,0,10,14],[8,8,0,14],[8,8,0,14] bit-exact.
bar_c_blocker: Q = S o LearnPermutation where S is catboost's initial learn-set Fisher-Yates shuffle (CreateShuffledIndices = fisher_yates_permutation(random_seed)); the port is a thin alias over cb-train's existing primitive (verified: the identity learning fold's perm_subset=[0..29] yields a non-natural object cat-sequence). pc=4 tree-B borders [3,7] SPLIT the mixed cat buckets (cat3,cat4), so leaf VALUES depend on the exact per-mixed-bucket bin->object assignment, which needs S. The must_haves [11,18,15,..] reproduces the pc=4 PARTITION [8,8,0,14] but the wrong leaf VALUES (leaf1 sum_y=6 vs upstream 5). cb-train materializes on object-order X_cat without S; closing bar-(c) requires porting S (data-provider storage order) — a research-grade subsystem out of scope. pc=1 is green because its borders do not split the mixed buckets (leaf composition invariant to order there).

averaging_fold.note: Q = data-provider storage reorder S composed with the averaging fold LearnPermutation; this is the ORDER the online-CTR prefix consumes (Feature[docIdx]/GetData order), NOT GetLearnPermutationArray()=[11,18,15,..] (the leaf-index iteration order).
averaging_fold.target_classifier: LearnTargetClass[1] (= binarized y); LearnTargetClass[0] is all-zeros (unused)
averaging_fold.averaging_permutation_note: P_avg: the averaging fold permutation over the S-SHUFFLED learn data (GetLearnPermutationArray). Original-object CTR order Q = [S[p] for p in P_avg].
averaging_fold.object_permutation_Q_note: Q = [S[p] for p in P_avg]: the TRUE original-object averaging CTR order (S=initial shuffle, P_avg=averaging perm over shuffled). Supersedes the earlier cat+y-reconstructed Q.
averaging_fold.avg_bins_ctr_order_note: The captured ui8 bins in CTR materialization order (P_avg over shuffled data) — the UNAMBIGUOUS ground truth. materialize_ctr_feature(.., Q, ..).bins[Q[k]] == avg_bins_ctr_order[k].

averaging_fold.note: Q = data-provider storage reorder S composed with the averaging fold LearnPermutation; this is the ORDER the online-CTR prefix consumes (Feature[docIdx]/GetData order), NOT GetLearnPermutationArray()=[11,18,15,..] (the leaf-index iteration order).
averaging_fold.target_classifier: LearnTargetClass[1] (= binarized y); LearnTargetClass[0] is all-zeros (unused)
averaging_fold.averaging_permutation_note: P_avg: the averaging fold permutation over the S-SHUFFLED learn data (GetLearnPermutationArray). Original-object CTR order Q = [S[p] for p in P_avg].
averaging_fold.object_permutation_Q_note: Q = [S[p] for p in P_avg]: the TRUE original-object averaging CTR order (S=initial shuffle, P_avg=averaging perm over shuffled). Supersedes the earlier cat+y-reconstructed Q.
averaging_fold.avg_bins_ctr_order_note: The captured ui8 bins in CTR materialization order (P_avg over shuffled data) — the UNAMBIGUOUS ground truth. materialize_ctr_feature(.., Q, ..).bins[Q[k]] == avg_bins_ctr_order[k].

initial_learn_set_shuffle_note: S = catboost initial learn-set shuffle = CreateShuffledIndices = fisher_yates_permutation(30,0); captured by direct trainer instrumentation (learn_set_shuffle event, pre_shuffle_callcount=0, 29 draws). S[k] = original object index at shuffled position k. The averaging CTR order Q = S o P_avg reproduces averaging_fold.ctr_bins_object_order and all 5 partitions bit-exact. (The earlier 'storage_reorder_S' reconstruction [5,2,6,..] was a cat+y matching artifact and is superseded.)
